name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new behavior

**What problem does this solve?**

<!-- Describe the workflow or pain point. Concrete examples help. -->

**What would you like muxx to do?**

<!-- A clear description of the proposed behavior. -->

**Does this fit muxx's scope?**

muxx is intentionally minimal — it wraps tmux session management and nothing else. It does not aim to provide a TUI, pane/window orchestration, plugin system, zoxide integration, or telemetry. See the [non-goals in the README](https://github.com/harshsandhu44/muxx#why-muxx) for the full list.

If you're unsure whether your idea fits, that's fine — describe it and we can discuss.

<!-- Are there workarounds or other tools that partially solve this? -->
